issues.description: Missing static ability condition: 'If you have 2 or less Life cards, this Character gains +1000 power' is not represented in DSL. Requires a separate effect with condition HasLifeCards≤2 and PowerBoost action.

SearchDeck action incomplete: Card text specifies 'Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Holly]' but DSL lacks searchCount:5 parameter and reveal mechanics. The 'up to 1' means maxResults should be 1.

SearchDeck destination should handle card ordering: text states 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' which requires deckOrdering or similar mechanic not present in current action structure.
PlayFromHand filter incomplete: should specify 'up to 1' [Holly] card, not all Holly cards. Needs maxPlay:1 constraint and filter should target subType Holly specifically.
